sections.paragraph:
verb לחרוב

be ruined, destroyed; be dried up

verb להיחרב

be ruined, destroyed; dried up

verb לחרב

to destroy, ruin

verb להחריב

to destroy, ruin; dry up

verb הוחרב

be destroyed, ruined; dried up

masculine noun

sword, saber, sabre, dagger

adjective

destroyed, in ruins, ruined, ruinous, waste
